trade.summary: Modest bilateral trade. Brazil exports agricultural products, iron ore, and chemicals to Israel. Israel exports medical equipment, high-tech products, and agricultural technology. Trade has been impacted by political tensions.

diplomatic.summary: Relations deteriorated sharply following the October 7, 2023 Hamas attack and Israeli military campaign in Gaza. Brazil recalled its ambassador to Israel in 2024 and President Lula made controversial comparisons of the Gaza campaign to the Holocaust. Brazil has been vocal in demanding a ceasefire.
recent_incidents: Lula's Holocaust comparison remarks caused major diplomatic row
Brazil supports ICJ case against Israel

military.summary: Previously Israel supplied drones and surveillance technology to Brazil. Military cooperation has cooled significantly since 2023. Brazil suspended some defense-related contacts.

financial.summary: Brazilian-Jewish business community maintains some commercial links. Israeli tech companies have some Brazilian market presence. Overall financial ties are limited.

energy.summary: Very limited energy trade. Some Israeli involvement in agricultural technology that can reduce energy inputs.

scientific.summary: Scientific cooperation continues despite political tensions. Joint research in agrotechnology, medicine, and computer science. Israeli AgTech companies have partnerships with EMBRAPA.
